message:
fix(term): replace scroll_up remove().unwrap() with graceful break

In scroll_up, VecDeque::remove(remove_idx) returns None if the index
is out of bounds. The previous unwrap() would panic if the scroll
region had fewer lines than expected (possible during concurrent
resize). Now breaks the reuse loop gracefully, falling through to
the existing fresh-line allocation path.

Validated: 254 term tests pass via rch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
